summary: Fresh anti-regression batch blocked at custom module install due missing capability-read group external id referenced by recovered seed data.
failure_reason: sc_capability_group_seed.xml references smart_construction_core.group_sc_cap_project_read in required_group_ids during fresh install stage before that xmlid is available.
next_step: Open dedicated recovery batch to make capability seed install-order safe on fresh DB, then rerun ITER-1290 acceptance chain.
